authoredShaderContract.colorPath: Geometry Attribute col Color → Principled BSDF Base Color
authoredShaderContract.roughnessPath: Geometry Attribute rough Color → Principled BSDF Roughness
authoredShaderContract.metalnessPath: Geometry Attribute metal Color → Principled BSDF Metallic
authoredShaderContract.browserResolution: The generic attribute-Principled resolver binds all three evaluated fields. Blender's sharp_face field is represented by flatShading=true without changing topology.

capture.lighting: Blender studio.exr and the byte-identical Three.js PMREM environment at intensity 0.8, plus the shared authored area-light rig

interpretation: Topology, silhouette, material assignment, fields, flat shading, and the broad light/dark pattern are verified. The remaining blue-channel and local luminance error is an explicit Eevee-versus-Three.js Principled and environment-filtering residual, not a geometry or graph-field mismatch.
